_comment: Project config for `relay` (the generic engine reads this — it hardcodes nothing about these columns/agents/skills). `pipeline` lists AI stages left-to-right; the runner works cards right-to-left. Per stage: `from` = column a ready card is pulled from, `done` = where to push when finished (a *:Review lane = human checkpoint, else auto-continues), `action` = ordered steps. Each step is {shell: <cmd>} or {claude: <prompt>}; a nonzero shell exit flags the card (invariant 7, no retry-loop). Templates: {ref} {title} {branch} {pr_url} {stage} {from} {done} {relay} {url}. State travels on the card: spec=spec field, plan=plan field, branch+pr_url=their fields (invariant 4). Regenerate the skeleton from the board with `relay layout`.

action.claude: You are the AI working Relay card {ref} at the SPEC stage. Run /brainstorm {ref} to completion — headless, no human to dialogue with. It reads the card (honoring any CHANGES REQUESTED block), designs the feature, and writes the spec back to the card, or calls {relay} needs-input {ref} "<question>" if it genuinely needs clarification. This is authorized; proceed without asking. Then STOP. Do not touch git or other cards.

You are the AI working Relay card {ref} at the PLAN stage. Run /write-plan {ref} to completion — it reads the approved spec from the card and writes the implementation plan back to the card. This is authorized; proceed without asking. Then STOP. Do not touch git or other cards.

action.shell: git fetch origin --prune && git checkout main && git reset --hard origin/main && git checkout -B {branch}

action.claude: You are the AI working Relay card {ref} at the CODE stage. Run /exec-plan {ref} on the current branch to completion — it materializes the plan from the card into a transient plan.md, runs the workflow, and cleans up after itself. This is authorized — proceed without asking for confirmation. Do not merge; exec-plan stops before the human-gated finish.

action.shell: url=$(gh pr create --fill --head {branch} --base main) && {relay} branch {ref} {branch} && {relay} pr {ref} "$url" && echo "PR: $url"
sleep 15 && gh run watch $(gh run list --branch main --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId') --exit-status
